summary.main_failure_mode: Stage83C/Stage84F increased false_NE external errors and suppressed SUPPORT/REFUTE entitlement recall.
summary.recommended_next_stage: Stage88A non-leaking balanced entitlement recovery bridge design/generation

design_constraints.rule: Do not use VitaminC external claim/evidence examples from Stage73/84F/87A as training bridge rows.
Stage71 retry2 remains the primary checkpoint until a candidate beats it on clean-dev preservation and external diagnostic.
Do not add additional NE-safety-only bridge rows by default; Stage83A increased false_NE external errors.
Next bridge must target SUPPORT/REFUTE recall recovery under sufficient evidence, not generic NOT_ENTITLED conservatism.
Any recovery bridge must track false_SUPPORT_on_NE and false_REFUTE_on_NE so entitlement recovery does not simply over-entitle.

candidate_options.description: Create a small non-leaking synthetic/internal bridge emphasizing SUPPORT and REFUTE entitlement recovery with matched NE guardrails.
candidate_options.expected_effect: Reduce false_NE_on_SUPPORT and false_NE_on_REFUTE without expanding NE prediction mass.
candidate_options.risk: May increase false_SUPPORT_on_NE or false_REFUTE_on_NE if recovery pressure is too strong.

candidate_options.description: Evaluate post-hoc final-head threshold/logit calibration on existing Stage71/Stage84F predictions without retraining.
candidate_options.expected_effect: Diagnose whether NE over-selection is a decision-boundary issue rather than representation issue.
candidate_options.risk: May not generalize if calibration relies on external labels; must remain diagnostic-only unless using clean-dev.

candidate_options.description: Add paired SUPPORT/REFUTE templates where evidence is sufficient and polarity is explicit, with no extra NE-only rows.
candidate_options.expected_effect: Recover REFUTE recall and SUPPORT recall while not increasing polarity flips.
candidate_options.risk: Can worsen false_SUPPORT_on_REFUTE / false_REFUTE_on_SUPPORT if templates are too shallow.

promotion_criteria.threshold: candidate VitaminC external macro_f1_all3 >= Stage73 macro_f1_all3
candidate VitaminC external accuracy >= Stage73 accuracy
false_NE_total < Stage73 false_NE_total or at minimum < Stage84F false_NE_total
